post.summary: Unsubscribes a user from receiving emails
Unsubscribes a user from a given item for notifications.

delete.summary: Removes a unsubscribe item for a user.

Unmutes all notifications.
Existing notifications that were muted manually will remain muted.

get.summary:
Wrapper handler that calls the inner generic list handler with `serde_json::Value`,
then converts each row to [`UserNotificationRow<NotifEvent>`].
get.description: Rows that fail to deserialize are dropped with a warning log.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor value. Base64 encoded timestamp and item id.

post.summary:
Wrapper handler that calls the inner generic bulk-get handler with `serde_json::Value`,
then converts each row to [`UserNotificationRow<NotifEvent>`].
post.description: Rows that fail to deserialize are dropped with a warning log.

commentGithubId.description: The GitHub numeric id of the comment, when available.

commentKind.description: The kind of comment that was posted.

commentSnippet.description: A truncated excerpt of the comment body.

commentUrl.description: The public GitHub URL for the comment, when available.

GithubPrNotificationCommon.description:
Fields shared by every GitHub pull request notification type.

Embedded with `#[serde(flatten)]` so the wire shape keeps these keys at the
top level of the metadata object.

displayName.description: A compact label suitable for display in the UI.

foreignEntityId.description: The source-specific internal foreign entity row id for this pull request.

githubKey.description: The external GitHub key, in `owner/repo/pull/number` format.

owner.description: The GitHub repository owner or organization.

senderGithubAvatarUrl.description: The GitHub avatar URL for the sender, when available.

senderGithubLogin.description: The GitHub login for the sender, when available.

senderGithubUserId.description: The stable GitHub numeric user id for the sender, serialized as a string.

title.description: The GitHub pull request title. Falls back to `display_name` when GitHub has no title.

url.description: The public GitHub URL for the pull request.

allOf.description: Fields shared with the other GitHub pull request notifications.

reviewGithubId.description: The GitHub numeric id of the review, when available.

reviewSnippet.description: A truncated excerpt of the review body, when any was written.

reviewUrl.description: The public GitHub URL for the review, when available.

GithubPrReview.description: Metadata for a notification that a review was submitted on the user's GitHub pull request.

GithubPrReviewState.description: The state of a submitted GitHub pull request review.

allOf.description: Fields shared with the other GitHub pull request notifications.

action.description: The webhook action that triggered this notification.

baseBranch.description: The pull request base branch, when available.

headBranch.description: The pull request head branch, when available.

mergedAt.description: When the pull request was merged, when available.

oneOf.description: The prior normalized pull request status, when known.

status.description: The current normalized pull request status.

GithubPrStatusChanged.description: Metadata for a GitHub pull request lifecycle notification.

allOf.description: Fields shared with the other GitHub pull request notifications.

requestedReviewerGithubLogin.description: The GitHub login of the requested reviewer, when available.

requestedReviewerGithubUserId.description: The stable GitHub numeric user id of the requested reviewer, serialized as a string.

NotifEvent.description:
Mirrors [`model_notifications::NotificationEvent`] but uses `tag` / `content`
as the serde adjacently-tagged field names so it can be deserialized from the
shape produced by [`UserNotificationRow::into_tagged`] +
[`UserNotificationRow::into_json`].

Only includes variants whose metadata types implement the `Notification` trait.

NotificationBulkRequest.description: the notification ids that we are bulk updating

notificationIds.description: The ids of the notifications to handle

NotificationDocumentSubType.description:
The sub type of a document in a notification.
Serializes as `{ "type": "task" }` matching the storage service pattern.

NotificationTypeName.description: newtype wrapper for the the typename of a Notification

notificationId.description: The id of the notification record (UserNotification.id)

senderProfilePictureUrl.description:
The sender's profile picture URL, used by the Notification Service Extension
to download and attach as a rich notification image.

fileType.description: The file type of the document.

oneOf.description: The sub type of the document (e.g. task).

TaggedContent_Value.description: A notification metadata value tagged with the notification event type.

assignedBy.description: The user who assigned the task
